ddls:
CREATE TABLE "yearly_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly summary */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the summary is recorded */,
  "new_topics" INTEGER /* Number of new topics created in the year */,
  "new_posts" INTEGER /* Number of new posts created in the year */,
  "new_members" INTEGER /* Number of new members joined in the year */,
  "most_online" INTEGER /* Maximum number of users online at once during the year */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Total number of page views in the year */,
  "avg_topics_per_month" REAL /* Average number of topics per month */,
  "avg_posts_per_month" REAL /* Average number of posts per month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly summary */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the summary is recorded */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the summary is recorded */,
  "new_topics" INTEGER /* Number of new topics created in the month */,
  "new_posts" INTEGER /* Number of new posts created in the month */,
  "new_members" INTEGER /* Number of new members joined in the month */,
  "most_online" INTEGER /* Maximum number of users online at once during the month */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Total number of page views in the month */,
  "avg_daily_topics" REAL /* Average number of topics per day */,
  "avg_daily_posts" REAL /* Average number of posts per day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_summaries_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES yearly_summaries ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the forum belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the forum was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the forum was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum the topic belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the topic */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the topic */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the topic was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the topic was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the topic has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the topic */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the topic (e.g., open, closed, pinned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the post belongs to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last updated */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the post has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the platform */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or profile description */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "reputation" INTEGER /* User's reputation score */,
  "warning_level" INTEGER /* User's warning level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, moderate) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, post, reply) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_email" INTEGER /* Preference for receiving email notifications */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language */,
  "(private_messages)" INTEGER /* Whether to allow private messages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the vote is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_votes_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the vote is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_votes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the tag is assigned to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topic_tags_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the attachment is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_attachments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bans" (
  "ban_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ban */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was banned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ban */,
  "ban_date" TEXT /* Date and time the ban was applied */,
  "unban_date" TEXT /* Date and time the ban will expire or was lifted */,
  "banned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who applied the ban */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ban_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bans_banned_by FOREIGN KEY ("banned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was warned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the warning */,
  "warning_date" TEXT /* Date and time the warning was issued */,
  "warned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who issued the warning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warnings_warned_by FOREIGN KEY ("warned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warnings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
